e0f2c3a90b50.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
e0f2c3a90b50.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
e0f2c3a90b50.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

e3ce26e1c66b.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
e3ce26e1c66b.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
e3ce26e1c66b.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

fcca76fbbb4d.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
fcca76fbbb4d.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

af51c0affc9a.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
af51c0affc9a.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
af51c0affc9a.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

e8e7d3a0fbb7.title: Ranked #8 of 9 locally — peers are ahead
e8e7d3a0fbb7.description: At percentile 12.5, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

15a1bbf8bb57.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
15a1bbf8bb57.description: You trail peers by 1.3 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

2e9307a6db31.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
2e9307a6db31.description: You trail peers by 1.1 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
